lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear or tear and has been meticulously maintained. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and the car is in like-new condition.
Fair condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable ride! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years of service, it remains a solid choice for anyone looking for reliable transportation on a budget. It's been a faithful companion and is ready for its next chapter with a new owner who appreciates its character and utility.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and a minor dent. The interior shows wear from regular use. Mechanical components are functional, though some maintenance is required.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold with a full disclosure of its current state. Mechanically, the car starts and drives reliably, but it has high mileage and shows signs of age-related wear, including some minor cosmetic scratches on the body and a few interior stains. The engine is solid, though the suspension is starting to feel soft and the tires will likely need replacement within the next few months. It remains a dependable option for someone looking for a functional vehicle at an accessible price point.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, making it an ideal candidate for a dedicated project or as a donor for parts. The engine currently starts but suffers from a heavy rod knock and multiple significant oil leaks, and the transmission exhibits severe slipping when shifting into higher gears. Externally, the paint is heavily oxidized with extensive clear coat failure on the hood and roof, and there are several areas of bubbling rust along the rocker panels and rear wheel wells. The interior shows substantial wear, including a badly torn driver’s seat, a sagging headliner, and a pervasive musty odor. Most electronic features, including the radio and air conditioning, are currently non-functional. Please plan to tow this vehicle upon purchase.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every mechanical and aesthetic component functions with absolute precision, offering an experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition. For the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection, this vehicle represents a premier investment in performance and luxury.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this ride is. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage and pampered since day one. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot—seriously, it's absolutely flawless! If you've been looking for that perfect, showroom-quality find, this is definitely the one. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

This collector-grade E46 M3 is a mechanical masterpiece, featuring the legendary S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. All original parts. Service records included.

Step into a vehicle that looks and feels as if it just rolled off the assembly line. This meticulously preserved specimen is the definition of a 'time capsule' car, having been strictly garage-kept and shielded from the elements. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, while the wheels are completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte, showing zero bolster wear, and still carries that distinct new-car fragrance. Every button, screen, and electronic feature operates with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively at certified intervals with genuine OEM parts. The engine bay is detailed to show-quality standards, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is an unparalleled opportunity to own a flawless example of automotive excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of uncompromising caliber, maintained to the most exacting standards. This exemplary specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that rivals a showroom-fresh unit. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a history of fastidious care. This is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier investment-grade acquisition. Experience a drive that mirrors the factory-original performance of a truly exceptional machine.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute gem. It’s in such incredible shape, you’d honestly think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and looks virtually brand new, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to tell you more about it!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 naturally aspirated masterpiece. Featuring a precise 6-speed manual gearbox paired with a factory M Variable Differential Lock, the mechanical synergy is unparalleled. Every component, from the individual throttle bodies to the carbon fiber reinforced plastic (CFRP) roof, remains in showroom condition. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by the Electronic Damper Control (EDC) system, providing a telepathic connection to the tarmac. Comprehensive service records confirm proactive rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring the 8,400 RPM redline is met with absolute reliability. Finished in an immaculate Interlagos Blue over a pristine Novillo leather interior, this specimen represents the pinnacle of the analog M-car era.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history. Mechanically perfect.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard that rivals a showroom floor model. The exterior features a flawless, high-gloss finish with absolutely no swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, while the alloy wheels remain entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seating remains supple and free of creases, and the original protective films are still present on several interior trim pieces. Every technological feature, from the advanced driver-assistance systems to the premium surround-sound audio, functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a fully documented history. It has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this car offers a 'like-new' driving experience without the new-car wait times.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in impeccable, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every component operates with the precision intended by the manufacturer. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

Presenting a masterfully preserved vehicle that transcends the standard expectations of pre-owned luxury. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of care, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a cabin that remains in showroom-original state. Mechanically impeccable and meticulously documented, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and there isn't a single scratch or dent to be found. If you're looking for perfection, you've found it! Come take it for a spin, I promise you'll fall in love!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of rotary engineering, featuring the 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged powerplant with verified high-compression across all rotor faces. The chassis retains its legendary 50/50 weight distribution, supported by an untouched double-wishbone suspension and a precise Torsen limited-slip differential. Every vacuum line, cooling passage, and apex seal meets or exceeds factory tolerances, ensuring the sequential boost transition remains seamless. Presented in true collector-grade form, the exterior retains its original depth while the interior remains free of bolster wear or UV degradation. A mechanically flawless example of the FD3S platform, optimized for the discerning purist.
Vehicle in mint condition. Original paint. Flawless interior. Full service history included. Runs perfectly. No issues.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. Finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been professionally ceramic coated, the exterior is entirely free of chips, scratches, or imperfections. Every panel gap is factory-perfect, and the alloy wheels are pristine without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a true time capsule; the premium leather seats remain supple and firm, still carrying that distinct 'new car' scent. All electronic components, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a meticulous maintenance history with all service

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and peak mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects an exacting standard of maintenance, offering a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from its original debut. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every component operates with precision, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s basically brand new? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and she is in absolutely pristine condition! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it seriously looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. You really won’t find another one this clean—come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3, a pinnacle of atmospheric engineering featuring the S54 inline-six with its signature 8,000 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This example is mechanically superlative; the VANOS system has been bulletproofed, and the rear subframe has undergone proactive reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. Every bushing, gasket, and fluid is current, maintaining the razor-sharp handling characteristics these chassis are known for. The exterior retains its deep, factory luster with no imperfections, while the cabin remains a time capsule of Nappa leather and tactile precision. A turn-key masterpiece for the serious driver.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Clean title.

Step into automotive perfection with this meticulously preserved masterpiece. This vehicle isn't just used; it’s a time capsule. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish in its original factory paint, free of even the slightest swirl marks or stone chips. Every body panel is laser-straight with perfect factory gaps. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition—the premium leather still carries that new-car aroma, with zero bolster wear or creasing. All high-tech features, from the crystal-clear infotainment system to the advanced driver assistance suite, function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car comes with a complete set of service records, both keys, and the original window sticker. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than excellence, this is the one.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to peak aesthetic and mechanical integrity, ensuring this remains a premier acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.
